div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Chargé in China (Atcheson)
div.p:
1153. Department appreciates receiving comment contained in your 1444, August 13, 11 a.m. and is considering your suggestion for
action.In line with this suggestion the Secretary of State made a public statement on September 17, 1943, Department of State Bulletin, September 18, 1943, p. 179. In your contacts with Chinese you may take the opportunity to point out again that the Department does not presume to exercise control over press writers in this country and does not assume responsibility for what they write. With specific reference to Baldwin’s article, you may say that it of course in no wise represents the thought and feeling of the high responsible authorities of this Government. There will follow a telegram giving paraphrased excerpts of a press article in reply to Baldwin and to several other adverse critics.
